ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Albert L. Boasberg, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Ponce Mercurio and Helen Mercurio.
Plaintiff's Witness: Helen Mercurio, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1---Copy of Letter dtd 10-15-04--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of Check #1011 in the amount of $11,439.00------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Letter by Gregory Hayness dtd 03-31-06---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: FBE & Sons General Construction, Mabuhay Builders and Frankie B. English.
Matter is taken under submission for reviewing of Proposed Judgement submitted in court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits along with the Judgment when is ready.

2:30 P.M.
Judgment granted as follows:
Principal $11,439.00
Prejudgment Interest $2,716.91
Costs $422.50.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
